title: Fix exporter to preserve unknown HPOM JSON fields on sync
description: export_to_files.py currently strips arbitrary JSON keys not in its schema when writing task files. This erases HPOM fields (objective, required_context, files_in_scope, forbidden_changes, expected_artifacts, reviewer_role, risk) after any sync. Fix: read the existing task JSON file before writing, merge unknown keys from the SQLite-derived payload into the existing JSON, then write. This makes promote_task.py --no-sync workaround unnecessary.
acceptance_criteria: HPOM fields in a task JSON survive a sync round-trip through export_to_files.py
existing task JSON fields not in SQLite schema are preserved, not stripped
tests verify round-trip preservation of objective, reviewer_role, risk
